name: gitmerit
description: GitMerit — scores developer GitHub profiles, resumes, and LinkedIn with AI-backed feedback

scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter backend build
scripts.lint:check: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter backend lint:check
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter frontend test:coverage && pnpm --filter backend test:cov
scripts.clean: pnpm --recursive exec rm -rf dist coverage && rm -rf packages/frontend/playwright-report packages/frontend/test-results
scripts.check: pnpm lint:check && pnpm type-check && pnpm test && pnpm build

author: Andrii Maksymov

pnpm.comment: Security overrides for transitive deps flagged by `pnpm audit --prod --audit-level=high`. Each selector is scoped to the vulnerable range so non-vulnerable majors used elsewhere (older minimatch/path-to-regexp/ws) are untouched. Revisit when the direct dependencies bump these upstream.

auditConfig.comment: lodash GHSA-r5fr-rjxr-66jc has no released fix (its 'patched >=4.18.0' does not exist; latest lodash is 4.17.21). It reaches us only transitively via @nestjs/config's internal object helpers on non-attacker-controlled input, so it is not exploitable here. Remove once lodash ships a patched release.
